title: test: Update error string for --file-locks test
body:
Add `fileLocks` api option and replace the update the substring test to match the end of the error message.

Closes: #12366

comments.body: LGTM, I think this is needed urgently cause some unrelated checkpoint tests are failing across CI in other PR
@rst0git Is this also related to the flakes seen here https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12364

> @rst0git Is this also related to the flakes seen here #12364

Yes, it looks like the same problem.
